Name: Sort Team Project Executions and Verify Home Page
Description: Navigate to project executions, sort by ID in ascending order, and verify the home page after clicking on failed executions.
Test Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to team/*/project/*/executions/*
Step 2: Click on button SortIDAscending
Step 3: Click on span StartedAscending
Step 4: Click on div failedExecutions (FailedED1451AuthOnly) -> Navigate to page ''
Step 5: Take full page screenshot as checkpoint
